title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-contained LLM runner that bundles model weights, config & data into one Modelfile; supports Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client & async wrapper for the Ollama HTTP API; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; identical API surface to the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama LLM & embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) that talks to local Ollama; chat folders, multi-user, RAG, OpenAI-compat endpoints.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, model management, embeddings, unit-test utils.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; idiomatic Ruby blocks for streaming.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Community npm CLI for chatting, pulling & benchmarking models; auto-completion, themes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot calls to a local Ollama instance (OpenAI proxy).

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator & OllamaEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-chat-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama replies, supports threads & slash commands.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) plus docker-compose stacks with GPU runtime.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling & PVC support.

title: ollama-models
summary: Curated Modelfile recipes for Llama-3, Phi-3, Mixtral, CodeLlama, Vicuna, etc.; community PRs welcome.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain; ingest PDFs & query via CLI.

title: ollama-gui-react
summary: Lightweight React front-end (Vite) that consumes Ollama REST API; dark mode, Markdown, code highlight.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama server & CLI; pinned CUDA & ROCm variants.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, list, copy, delete models.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# / .NET SDK for Ollama; supports .NET 6+ and streaming IAsyncEnumerable.

title: ollama-datasets
summary: Public domain datasets pre-converted to Ollama training format; alpaca, oasst1, code-alpaca, etc.
